name: codex-phone-upload
description: Generate a fast same-Wi-Fi QR code and paste phone images into the current Codex composer as unsent attachments, with optional remote mode.

interface.shortDescription: Scan a QR code and attach phone images to the Codex composer
interface.longDescription: Creates a one-time same-Wi-Fi upload page, with optional remote mode, so phone screenshots and photos can be attached to the current Codex composer. The bilingual Chinese and English upload queue validates file limits before transfer. The plugin never sends the message, analyzes the images, or saves them to the project.
defaultPrompt: Use fast same-Wi-Fi mode to generate a QR code and attach selected phone images to the current Codex composer without sending or analyzing them.
